hfe48935dg90dfg435fg9d60g2461cd958136: To lose such a great man. It just doesn't feel real.
h66ac041ag3a52g4983gb901g43df18fba3a9: Please be careful - for both your sake, and Master Halsin's.
hadf05a3egfbf9g4932gaf41gad3e1f7cd46e: I hear you put an end to Kagha's treachery. My thanks.
h430cc800g5cc9g4d76gacc1g729996111131: But what about your other mission? Any word on Master Halsin?
h11b0a547gb305g4aa7g819fgd1aaf89d4c8c: I hear you brought Kagha back from the brink. My thanks.
ha976a4ecg4c1bg4214gadb9g235713c09c1e: It was brave of your companion to agree to take the poison.
h9d4f76ccg700eg4ec3g94fdgd00451915238: Please keep an eye on him while you're looking for Master Halsin... just in case.
hcc620d24gb5cag4c78gbe32gc5b070714a65: Please keep an eye on them while you're looking for Master Halsin... just in case.
hc266d6c9g9d59g45b9g8ea7g8f2865158071: Please keep an eye on her while you're looking for Master Halsin... just in case.
h835de047g4663g4a6dgaaa7g240d4c227acd: I - Thank you. For trying, and for telling me. At least now we know.
h7f9700c1g3a42g4752g84c2g9ffdc3d6b8bd: Excuse me. I think I need to be alone.
h7de581cbga7a9g453ag9f75g4ddf887276cf: Halsin's alive - he's being held at the goblins' camp.
h896a0adeg9deeg460eg867fg02f67722f2b0: Thank the Father he's alive. Please, you have to get him out of there.
h56e81228gd285g45bfga165g8bc1ff7ffcd3: That's the plan. I'll do whatever it takes.
h5faaf949g38dfg4ac4gae10g4c31c018955c: I'm not risking my neck against that many goblins.
h4ed099cfg6f6bg460dg8087g74e8455230f5: Then your friend's dead. No one else will free them from that tadpole.
h26b4776fg2f94g45eag8227gf5face31a76d: Please, be smart about this. Save him.
hd1575407g9820g4a11g9434ge203aca31e10: Then you'll both die. No one else will free you from that tadpole.
ha92f85e0g9f56g43e9g91f7g5ea765e6f2da: Do you know where Halsin went?
h077479d1gc48dg47c1gb24bg7b79b26c1733: He and the adventurers were headed to the ruined temple in the west.
h617900bagdbffg48f2gadd2g97f2dd055ae5: Master Halsin studied that drow for days, and he was sure something at the temple could help his research. I'm praying he was right.
h37d49169gd76eg4cb0g997aga6d057e0a669: Your companion's a brave one. Not everyone would make a promise like that.
h887cb7a3g4dd5g412ega8b9g24f360607011: Please hurry - for both your sakes.
